title: Perpendicular Evasion Burn
summary: Evade incoming fire by thrusting perpendicular to the threat vector.
details: When under fire, the most effective evasion is to thrust perpendicular to the incoming projectile's path. Enemy targeting computers predict your position based on current velocity - a perpendicular burn invalidates their firing solution. Alternate between port and starboard burns unpredictably. Never thrust directly away from an enemy - you remain on the same vector and are easier to hit.
annotations: Core survival technique against guided projectiles.
Combine with rotation to present smallest profile.
